name: PER_JOBS_F_
description: PER_JOBS_F holds jobs that have been defined for an Enterprise. Jobs define the role that an employee can perform in the enterprise, and they are independent of specific organizations.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PROGRESSION_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Next possible job during promotion

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: JOB_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the job.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: SET_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies a set of reference data shared across business units and other entities. Also known as Reference Data Sets, they are used to filter reference data in transactional UIs.

columns.Name: BENCHMARK_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the benchmark job.

columns.Name: JOB_FAMILY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_JOB_FAMILY_F table.

columns.Name: JOB_SUB_FAMILY
columns.Comments: Sub Family that the Job is grouped in.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates if a job is active or inactive.

columns.Name: BENCHMARK_JOB_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if this job is a benchmark job.

columns.Name: APPROVAL_AUTHORITY
columns.Comments: Integer number to identify levels across jobs which are used for approvals if the job list builder is used.

columns.Name: SCHEDULING_GROUP
columns.Comments: Scheduling Group of the job. All the jobs belonging to a scheduling group follow a common work schedule.

columns.Name: MANAGER_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Indicates the management level of the job.

columns.Name: MED_CHECKUP_REQ
columns.Comments: Indicates if the job requires medical checkup.

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_HOURS
columns.Comments: Number of standard working hours.

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Frequency for the standard working hours.

columns.Name: STD_ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION
columns.Comments: The standard annual working duration for the job.

columns.Name: ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION_UNITS
columns.Comments: The unit of measure in hours, days, weeks, or months for the standard annual working duration.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Extensible Flexfield Category Code

columns.Name: REGULAR_TEMPORARY
columns.Comments: Indicates if a job is regular or temporary.

columns.Name: FULL_PART_TIME
columns.Comments: Indicates if a job is full-time or part-time.

columns.Name: JOB_FUNCTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the job function.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: GRADE_LADDER_ID
columns.Comments: Grade Ladder

columns.Name: REQUISITION_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Requisition Template

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
